hibernate-mapping.query: select distinct compEventEmail from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEventEmailParam compEventEmailParam join compEventEmailParam.CompanyEventEmail compEventEmail join compEventEmail.CompanyEvent.CompanyEventDetailSet detail where compEventEmail.CompanyEvent.Company = :company and detail.EventDetailTypeCd = :eventDetailTypeCode and detail.Value in (:values) and (compEventEmailParam.ParamTypeCd = 'PrimaryPrincipalEmail' or compEventEmailParam.ParamTypeCd = 'PayrollAdminEmail') and compEventEmailParam.Value = :emailAddress and compEventEmail.StatusCd in ('Sent', 'SendFailed') and compEventEmail.CompanyEvent.EventTypeCd = :eventType and compEventEmailParam.CompanyEventEmail.Company = compEventEmailParam.Company order by compEventEmail.CompanyEvent
